title: Den of Wolves: Infinite Domain
description:
It is the 27th Century. After a catastrophic attack on humanity, one battleship and a few civilian vessels must fight to survive, govern themselves and maintain order as they flee from their pursuers. Den of Wolves: Infinite Domain is a game about difficult political, military and survival choices in a long-term crisis scenario. Players will take on the roles of starship captains, officers, and engineers, as well as politicians and military personnel. The game has a focus on managing resources, as well as various units and assets – however, talking and negotiating with other players will be crucial in order to achieve success.

Infinite Domain is an expanded version of the classic Den of Wolves. Includes additional ships and roles, a new faction, as well as some streamlined rules and a graphical overhaul. Previous experience with Den of Wolves is not required to play.

NOTE: This game is at the Seattle University, not in Portland.
ticketLabel: Get Tickets for this Seattle Game
